title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Cognizant Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Cognizant Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
We at Cognizant Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cognizant Digital Technologies:
Cognizant Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cognizant Digital Technologies!
